description: Mastering the Zodiac is an astrology service focused on true sidereal astrology, offering chart calculators, reports, readings, courses, and online astrology software called True Sky. Its website is consumer-focused rather than developer-focused.
summary: Mastering the Zodiac exposes a known public MCP server at `https://truesky.masteringthezodiac.com/mcp`; no public developer HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLI documentation were found.
